title: The Millionaire Next Door
subtitle: The Surprising Secrets of America's Wealthy

authors.name: Thomas J. Stanley
authors.role: Author, researcher, marketing professor at Georgia State University. Earned PhD from University of Georgia. Spent decades studying America's affluent. Killed by a drunk driver in 2015.

authors.name: William D. Danko
authors.role: Marketing professor at University at Albany (SUNY). Earned PhD from Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute. Collaborated with Stanley on the research that became this book.
